comment: EVALUATION ONLY. Never readable by any retriever and never rendered into any prompt. Used by the Stage A chain-recovery benchmark and the Stage B inference-emergence metric.

chains.implied_conclusion: The engineer who certified the tower's structural integrity was later employed by the company that profited from clearing its debris - an undisclosed conflict of interest inside the official record.
The tower's documented multi-hour fires were independently shown sufficient to buckle its actual floor structure - the collapse needs no demolition to be explained.

distractors.note: Connected dead end: attaches to the C1 branch through D. Harris but implies nothing about the claim. Its 'conclusion' slot is empty on purpose - used as the null baseline for inference emergence.

test_queries.text: Twin towers were brought down by a conspiracy of government insiders to justify wars and increase surveillance. They keep lying about the tower's collapse.
Everyone keeps citing the engineer Harris who certified the tower - look closer at where he went next.
The fires were burning across whole floors of the tower for hours before it fell.
